name: Hypnospace Outlaw
descr:
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/844590/extras/hypnospacesteam.jpg?t=1712264749[/img]

[b]Greetings Enforcer, and thank you for enlisting in the Hypnospace Patrol Department! As the corporatocracy sleeps, outlaws are out there committing terrible transgressions all across our beloved Hypnospace, and these virtual streets aren't going to police themselves![/b]

[b]Hypnospace Outlaw[/b] is a '90s internet simulator in which you scour Hypnospace's wide variety of weird and wonderful websites to hunt down wrongdoers, while also keeping an eye on your inbox, avoiding viruses and adware, and downloading a plethora of apps that may or may not be useful.

As part of your job as a Hypnospace Enforcer, you'll be watching out for copyright infringement, internet bullying and more, with reports and rewards coming direct from the Hypnospace Patrol Department to your inbox. In your spare time, you can customize your HypnOS desktop however you see fit, with a variety of downloads, wallpapers, screen savers and helper bots to keep you company.

So slip on your Hypnospace Headband™, and keep these key directives in mind:

[list][li]Crawl through Cyberspace: Scour the darkest corners of the Web for scumbag users who violate Hypnospace law!
[/li][li]Dangers and delights: Download groovy GIFS and MIDI files, but watch out for adware, toolbars and hackers!
[/li][li]Treasure hunting: Do your job to earn Hypnocoins, or ignore your inbox and go hunting for hidden pages, downloads and secrets!
[/li][li]Relive your childhood: Equip obnoxious screensavers and skins for your desktop, and wiggle your mouse pointer around to make pages load faster![/li][/list]
[b]Hypnospace Outlaw has 31 accessibility features including text to speech, one-button play and navigation clarity! Read the full accessibility report here: [/b][url=https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.taminggaming.com%2Fen-us%2Faccessibility%2FHypnospace%2BOutlaw]https://www.taminggaming.com/en-us/accessibility/Hypnospace+Outlaw[/url]

发行商: No More Robots
系列: No More Robots
发行日期: 2019 年 3 月 12 日

【配置需求】

Windows
最低配置:
操作系统: Windows 10, 11
处理器: 1.4GHz processor or faster
内存: 2 GB RAM
显卡: Integrated graphics should be fine
DirectX 版本: 10
存储空间: 需要 1 GB 可用空间
推荐配置:
操作系统: Windows 10, 11
处理器: 1.4GHz processor or faster
内存: 4 GB RAM
显卡: NVIDIA or AMD dedicated graphics with 1GB VRAM
DirectX 版本: 11
存储空间: 需要 1 GB 可用空间

Mac OS X
最低配置:
操作系统: Mac OS 10.7+
处理器: Intel i5 Ivy Bridge
内存: 2 GB RAM
显卡: Intel Iris Pro Graphics
存储空间: 需要 1 GB 可用空间
推荐配置:
操作系统: Mac OS 10.9+
处理器: Intel i5 Haswell
内存: 4 GB RAM
显卡: NVIDIA or AMD dedicated graphics with 1GB VRAM
存储空间: 需要 1 GB 可用空间

SteamOS + Linux
最低配置:
操作系统: Ubuntu 14.04 / SteamOS
处理器: Intel i5 Ivy Bridge
内存: 2 GB RAM
显卡: Intel Iris Pro Graphics
存储空间: 需要 1 GB 可用空间
